tools.name: upcoming_catalysts
tools.description: Return upcoming biotech/pharma catalysts (clinical-trial readouts, FDA AdComm meetings, recent approvals) VERIFIED against and linked to their official source (ClinicalTrials.gov, Federal Register, openFDA). tools.name: catalyst_for_company
tools.description: Return verified catalyst events for one public company by ticker, each linked to its official source. Free preview; full data inline.

tools.name: catalyst_for_drug
tools.description: Return verified catalyst events referencing a drug/product name, each linked to its official source.
